title: Liz's 2026 Seed Share
description: Fresh-started seeds available for friends. Updated as varieties are planted.

varieties.name: Amish Gold Slicer
varieties.description: Large heirloom with gorgeous golden-orange fruit. Sweet and mild, beautiful on a plate.

varieties.name: Moonglow
varieties.description: Medium-sized heirloom, bright orange and really sweet. More fruity than your typical red tomato.

varieties.name: Mexican Midget
varieties.description: Tiny cherry tomatoes, incredibly productive. Great in pots, kids love them.

varieties.name: Summer Dance Hybrid
varieties.description: Classic slicing cucumber, 8-9 inches. Sets fruit without pollination, very reliable.

varieties.name: Santaka
varieties.description: Small hot Japanese chili, very spicy. Excellent for drying and making pepper flakes.

varieties.name: Sweet Stuff Hybrid
varieties.description: Sweet bell pepper, no heat at all. Perfect for fresh eating or grilling.

varieties.name: Rooster Spur
varieties.description: Hot cayenne-style pepper, long and skinny. Spicy kick, great dried or fresh.

varieties.name: TAM Jalapeño
varieties.description: Mild jalapeño with all the flavor but way less heat. You can actually taste it!

varieties.name: Genovese Basil
varieties.description: Classic Italian basil with big flavorful leaves. The one you want for pesto and caprese.
